About Vectis Mail

Vectis Mail is a product of Veltara Works, a software company focused on building infrastructure tools that give teams full control over their technology stack.

Email is critical infrastructure, yet most teams outsource it to services they can't control, can't inspect, and can't customise. Vectis Mail exists to change that — a production-grade mail server you can deploy in minutes, manage through a clean API and dashboard, and scale to enterprise needs.

Vectis is part of the Veltara Works ecosystem alongside ValidonX (licensing, billing, and identity platform). Together, they provide a complete foundation for SaaS products that need email delivery, user authentication, and subscription management.

The Veltara Works Ecosystem

Vectis Mail

Self-hosted email platform. Inbound/outbound mail, sending API, webhooks, admin dashboard.

ValidonX

Licensing, billing, and identity platform. Subscription management, feature gating, usage metering. Learn more →
